name: Lemon and Herb Crusted Swordfish
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and pat dry the swordfish steaks.
2. In a bowl combine the lemon zest, herbs, and cracked black pepper.
3. Season the fish with salt and pepper. Lightly brush one side of the fish with Dijon mustard.
4. Press the coated side into the herb mixture.
5. Heat vegetable oil in a no-stick skillet over medium heat.
6. Place the fish, coated side down, into the skillet. Cook for 4 minutes, until the crust turns golden.
7. Carefully turn the fish over and cook for an additional 3 minutes.
8. In a bowl toss arugula with 1 teaspoon olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
9. Divide the greens between two plates.
10. Top each plate with swordfish and drizzle with remaining olive oil.
Yield: 2 servings
